task_completion.description: Draw 4 points and 5 line segments forming the bicycle frame
task_completion.visual_evidence: A wireframe consisting of 4 points (A, B, C, D) and 5 line segments (AB, BC, CD, BD, AC) is visible in the SolveSpace workspace.

task_completion.description: Constrain Point B to the origin and line AB to be horizontal
task_completion.visual_evidence: Point B is located exactly at the origin (0,0) with a coincident constraint, and line AB has a horizontal constraint applied. Point A is positioned to the left of Point B.

task_completion.description: Apply length constraints to lines AB, BC, and CD
task_completion.visual_evidence: Length dimension labels of '430' on line AB, '450' on line BC, and '600' on line CD are visible in the workspace or property panel.

task_completion.description: Apply interior angle constraints for A-B-C and A-B-D
task_completion.visual_evidence: Angle dimension labels of '107' degrees between lines AB and BC, and '135' degrees between lines AB and BD are visible in the workspace.

task_completion.description: Ensure points C and D are at positive Y coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: Points C and D are visually located above the horizontal X-axis in the SolveSpace workspace.

task_completion.description: Save the file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace window title bar or a save dialog shows the filename 'bike_wireframe.slvs' in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the geometry
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SolveSpace application window, toolbars, and property panels.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by writing the .slvs file directly in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The geometry is actively being built and constrained within the SolveSpace graphical interface, rather than a terminal or text editor window showing raw file contents.

integrity.description: Constraints are genuinely applied using the software's constraint tools
integrity.visual_evidence: Constraints appear as standard SolveSpace UI elements (dimension lines, constraint icons) rather than text annotations or unconnected lines.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/bike_wireframe.slvs. Fixed lengths to verify: AB=430.0, BC=450.0, CD=600.0. Solved lengths (for reference if visible in the UI): AC=707.5, BD=958.9.
